view.dashboard.name: Dashboard
config.title: Redmine Client
config.baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Redmine instance.
config.ignoreSSLErrors.markdownDescripti: Ignore SSL certificate errors (e.g. for self-signed certificates). **For development/testing only. Do NOT enable in production.**
config.defaultProjectId.description: Default project identifier or ID used in ticket listing.
config.selectedProjectId.description: Last selected project ID (used for restoring selection).
config.selectedProjectName.description: Last selected project name (used for restoring selection).
config.includeChildProjects.description: Include child projects when listing tickets.
config.ticketListLimit.description: Default number of tickets to load per request.
config.editorStorageDirectory.descriptio: Absolute path to store ticket editor files. When empty, the default workspace location is used.
config.offlineSyncMode.description: Sync mode for explicit sync commands. Auto sends to Redmine immediately, manual queues for batch sync. Ctrl+S always saves locally regardless of this setting.
config.requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds (default: 30000ms = 30 seconds).
config.ticketList.showStatus.description: Show the status badge on each ticket row in the dashboard.
config.ticketList.showDueDate.descriptio: Show due date badges on ticket rows in the dashboard. When disabled, all due date badges are hidden regardless of the per-window display rules.
